slides.headline: RFA-1717DIC — 17×17" General Radiography
slides.subcopy: Advanced IGZO TFT technology with 3.4 lp/mm spatial resolution and 16-bit ADC for exceptional image clarity. IP68 waterproof protection for demanding clinical environments.

slides.alt: Medical imaging equipment in a clinical room
slides.headline: RFA-1717DIC — 17×17" General Radiography
slides.subcopy: Fast 2.5-second image acquisition with stable AED auto-trigger mode. 140μm pixel pitch delivers high-resolution imaging for precise diagnostics.

slides.headline: RFA-1717DIC — 17×17" General Radiography
slides.subcopy: ISO 4090 cassette compatible for seamless system integration. Giga Ethernet connectivity ensures reliable data transfer with 3072×3072 pixel matrix.

rfa-1717dic.name: RFA-1717DIC
rfa-1717dic.subtitle: Wide & Slim 17×17" Flat Panel Detector
rfa-1717dic.tagline: Advanced Flat Panel Detector Technology for General Radiography
rfa-1717dic.overview: The RFA-1717DIC is a high-performance 17×17" flat panel detector designed for general radiography applications. Built with advanced IGZO TFT technology and CsI scintillator, it delivers high-resolution imaging, stable Automatic Exposure Detection (AED), and reliable performance in clinical environments. Engineered to meet ISO 4090 cassette size standards, this detector integrates seamlessly into existing radiography systems while ensuring superior image clarity and workflow efficiency.

features.title: High Spatial Resolution
features.description: 3.4 lp/mm spatial resolution with 140 μm pixel pitch ensures exceptional diagnostic image clarity.

features.title: Fast Acquisition
features.description: Complete image acquisition in just 2.5 seconds, supporting efficient clinical workflows.

features.title: Auto Exposure Detection
features.description: Reliable AED trigger mode automatically detects x-ray exposure for hands-free operation.

features.title: IP68 Protection
features.description: Fully waterproof and dustproof to IP68 standard — built for demanding clinical environments.

features.title: 16-bit ADC
features.description: 65,536 grayscale levels captured via 16-bit analogue-to-digital conversion for superior image depth.

features.title: Gigabit Ethernet
features.description: Wired 1000BaseT connectivity enables rapid, reliable image transfer to any DICOM workstation.

performanceStats.label: Spatial Resolution
performanceStats.description: Best-in-class sharpness for general radiography imaging.

performanceStats.label: Modulation Transfer Function
performanceStats.description: Measured at 0.5 lp/mm (CsI) — superior contrast retention.

performanceStats.label: Detective Quantum Efficiency
performanceStats.description: Measured at 1 lp/mm (CsI) — excellent dose efficiency.

specs.label: Sensor Type
specs.value: a-Si TFT Active Matrix with PIN Diode
